In this chapter:

(1) “Aquatic aircraft” means a seaplane, floatplane, or similar aircraft that is capable of taking off and landing on water.

(2) “Department” means the Texas Department of Transportation.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 3
### Chapter 26. Aquatic Aircraft
##### § 26.001 — Definitions

In this chapter:

    (1) “Aquatic aircraft” means a seaplane, floatplane, or similar aircraft that is capable of taking off and landing on water.

    (2) “Department” means the Texas Department of Transportation.

*Added by Acts 1999, 76th Leg., ch. 820, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1999.*

subsections.text: “Aquatic aircraft” means a seaplane, floatplane, or similar aircraft that is capable of taking off and landing on water.
“Department” means the Texas Department of Transportation.
